summary: Frontend-only testing of grouped navigation bar feature. All tests PASSED - Desktop and mobile navigation working correctly with dropdown menus, active state highlighting, and accordion mobile menu.
critical_code_review_comments: data-testid attributes properly implemented for all nav buttons (nav-dashboard-button, nav-settings-button)
data-testid attributes for group buttons (nav-group-operations-button, nav-group-finance-button, etc.)
data-testid attributes for dropdown items (nav-pms-button, nav-night_audit-button, etc.)
Active state highlighting working correctly with bg-blue-600 class on standalone and group buttons
Dropdown menus close properly after item selection
Mobile hamburger menu with accordion-style groups working correctly
context_for_next_testing_agent: Grouped navigation feature fully tested. NAV_GROUPS in navItems.js defines 7 dropdown groups (operations, reservations, finance, channels, reports, advanced, infrastructure). NAV_ITEMS have navGroup field to assign items to groups. Items with navGroup=null (dashboard, settings) are standalone buttons. Layout.js uses DropdownMenu components with isGroupActive() to highlight parent group when child route is active.

tests.details: Dashboard button shows bg-blue-600 when on /app/dashboard
All 7 groups found: Operasyon, Rezervasyon, Finans, Kanallar, Raporlar, Gelismis, Altyapi
Dropdown opens on click, shows items: Calendar, PMS, PMS Operations, Housekeeping, etc.

tests.test: Group active state on PMS page
tests.details: Operasyon group button turns blue when navigating to /app/pms

tests.test: Group active state on Night Audit page
tests.details: Finans group button turns blue when navigating to /night-audit
Settings button visible, navigates to /app/settings, shows blue active state
Dropdown menu closes automatically after selecting an item
operations: 4/4, reservations: 3/3, finance: 3/3, channels: 4/4, reports: 2/2 items found
Mobile menu toggle button (data-testid=mobile-menu-toggle) works correctly
All groups shown with chevron icons indicating expandable accordions
Clicking Operasyon expands to show sub-items (Calendar, PMS, Housekeeping, etc.)
Mobile menu closes automatically after selecting an item
Dashboard and Settings buttons visible in mobile nav

screenshots_taken: nav_after_login.png - Initial nav bar after login

nav_nightaudit_active.png - Finans group active on Night Audit
